folio.label: 135r
folio.l: For whicú illusions , and swicú meschaunces
As hethen folk vseden , in thilke dayes
For whicú no lengere , maketú he delayes
But thurgú his Magyk , for a weke or tweye
It semed , that alle the Rokkes , were a weye
¢ Aurelius , whicú that ©et , despayred is
Wheither he shal han his lyf , or fare amys

note.notetxt: cross in ink in the right margin/ODR/

folio.l: A waytetú nygút and day , on this myracle
And whan he knew , that there was noon obstacle
That voided were theise Rokkes , euäychou~
Doun to his maistres feet , he fel a noon
And seide , I wooful wrecched Aurelius
Thank ©ow lord , and lady myn , Venus
That me han holpen , for my cares colde
And to the Temple , his weye , fortú hatú he holde
Where as he knew , he shulde his lady se
And whan he saugú his tyme , a noon rigút he
Witú dredful herte , and witú humble chere
Salued hatú , his souerayn lady dere
¢ My rigútful lady , quod this wooful man
Whom I moost drede and loue , as I best can
And lothest were , of al this world , displese
Nere it that I , for ©ow haue swicú dissese
That I must deyen heere , at ©oure foot a noon
Nougút wolde I telle , how me is woo bygon
But certes , either must I dye or pleyne
ñe sleen me giltlees , for verray peyne
But of my detú , thougú that ©e haue no routhe
A vysetú ©ow , er that ©e breke ©oure trouthe
Repentetú ©ow , for thilke god a boue
Or ©e me sleen , by cause that I ©ow loue
For Madame wel ©e woot , what ©e han higút
Nat that I chalenge , any thyngö of rigút
Of ©ow , my souerayn lady , but ©oure grace
But in a gardeyn ©onder , at swicú a place
ñe wot rigút wel , what ©e behigúten me
And in myn hond , ©oure treuthe pligút ©e
To loue me best , god wot ©e seide so
Al be , that I vnworthy am ther to
Madame , I speke it for the honour of ©ow
More than to saue , myn hertes lyf rigút now
I haue do so , as ©e comaunded me
And if ©e vouchesaf , ©e may go se

note.notetxt: note space between the lines, it seems stretched out. Double check. /ODR/
